author: Austin Crawford
title: Belmont Market in Wakefield
summary: Established in 1947 as a seasonal fruit and vegetable stand, Belmont was named by Siravo’s grandfather, “a great aficionado of the ponies,” after New York’s famed Belmont Park racetrack.
content:
Established in 1947 as a seasonal fruit and vegetable stand, Belmont was named by Siravo’s grandfather, “a great aficionado of the ponies,” after New York’s famed Belmont Park racetrack.

Belmont Market boasts the best bakery in town–not only because items like the scones are made in-store from scratch, but because it features products delivered from the best bakeries throughout Rhode Island.

Because Belmont runs its own wholesale produce operation and sources locally whenever possible, its product is often fresher than its chain store counterparts. “We work with many local farmers and try to keep it as downhome-farmstandy as possible, but in very chic kind of surroundings,” Siravo says

We deliver all your grocery needs to the Island every day.

 


Island Delivery

author: Will Gasner
title: MG Landscaping
summary: MG Landscaping is Block Island's premier landscaping service.  Trusted by both locals and vacation home owners for over a decade, MGL guarentees your lawn always looks prestine throughout the entire season.  Our team is proud to continue to earn our reputation for reliable and consistent work, excellent service, and uniformed professionalism.
content:
MG Landscaping is Block Island's premier landscaping service.  Trusted by both locals and vacation home owners for over a decade, MGL guarentees your lawn always looks prestine throughout the entire season.  Our team is proud to continue to earn our reputation for reliable and consistent work, excellent service, and uniformed professionalism.




For both residential and commerical properites, we provide a range of offerings from lawn and bed maintenance to landscape and hardscape services. Our work is a source of pride for us, which is why we provide free estimates and honest prices upfront.  We only use top of the line equipment to ensure the highest quality lawn and landscape work. Text or call us today for a free estimate by clicking the buttons below and get the best services for one of the most affodable prices available on Block Island.

 

Text Us Now

or

Call Us Now​



Our goals are to always be there on time and get the job done right. We clean up after ourselves, so your property always looks better than when we found it. The MG Landscaping team works hard to ensure your trust by delivering results that are second to none. You can have confidence that we'll do our best to make you happy and to keep your home looking beautiful year-round. If you have specific desires that you want to outline in detail please send us an email by clicking the button below.



Send Us An Email



If you would like to talk on the phone or meet in person to discuss your property and landscaping desires, please give us a call at 401-595-9638. We look forward to caring for your lawn and making your property look beautiful!

author: Robert Lucier
title: The Painted Rock
summary: The Painted Rock is an extremely popular landmark on Block Island. The Painted Rock is a tradition continued by the locals and visitors on Block Island. People literally paint on the Rock. The Painted Rock has been painted thousands of times, and the painting on the Rock can change at any time and can represent anything.
content:
The Painted Rock is an extremely popular landmark on Block Island. The Painted Rock is a tradition continued by the locals and visitors on Block Island. People literally paint on the Rock. The Painted Rock has been painted thousands of times, and the painting on the Rock can change at any time and can represent anything.

People paint the Rock for friend's birthdays, wedding proposals, The Fourth of July, and the list goes on. If you want to let your artistic side shine, you can always venture out and paint the famous Painted Rock.
address: Mohegan Trail New Shoreham New Shoreham

content:

Check us out, enjoy a free sample and get ready to enjoy popcorn like never before!

author: Robert Lucier
title: Block Island Ghost Tours
summary: Block Island Ghost Tours has many experiences to choose from nightly.
content:
Block Island Ghost Tours has many experiences to choose from nightly.

Old Harbor Walking Tour, New Harbor Walking Tour, and Ghost Ride Island Tour run daily all summer sharing stories of Block Island's darker history.

Spirits with Spirits is a unique experience that allows you to sip on your favorite libations with the ghosts of our local establishments.  

An Evening with Magic is an interactive, close-up magic show presented by our very own Rob Martin.

Psychic medium witch, Roxanne Jasparro, of Bewitched on the Block will be visiting weekly to do private readings and group experiences. Our location is also a retail shop for unique souvenirs and oddities.

 

Book Now

Guests can choose from a selection of hand-crafted dishes such as shrimp cocktail,  fresh lobster mac n' cheese, NY strip, and more, paired with nautical inspired cocktails that can be enjoyed indoors or outdoors alongside the stunning waterfront views.

title: Trader's Dock Bar at at Champlin's

title: The Barn at Spring House Restaurant
summary: The Barn is one of Block Island’s best kept secrets. This unique dining venue features an open kitchen and a wood fired grill, which creates wonderful flavors that cannot be duplicated at home. As soon as you step into the Barn, you immediately feel welcomed. A combination of our culinary staff cooking right in front of you and the intimate ambiance creates a perfect evening. This setting is designed for a quiet dining experience for adults and children above the age of 12 only. Reservations are highly recommended

author: Robert Lucier
title: Sachem Pond Lite Bites
summary: Sachem Pond Lite Bites is a local food truck at the Settler’s Rock on Block Island.
content:
Sachem Pond Lite Bites is a local food truck at the Settler’s Rock on Block Island.

We provide a snack stand for all your traveling needs, with a range of delicious snacks, refreshing drinks, and unique souvenirs made by locals that capture the essence of Block Island.

Whether you're craving chips or nuts or looking for a special memento to commemorate your trip, we've got you covered. And while you're here, take a walk to the North Light and experience the natural wildlife and breathtaking views of Block Island. 

Stop by our food truck and let us help you fuel up and make the most of your travels. 

Open daily from 11-5.

Follow us on Instagram @bisnackshack

author: Austin Crawford
title: Block Island By Bike
summary: will share light history and island folklore while leading a group of up to six people around beautiful Block Island. It is approximately two and a half hour scenic tour covers just under nineteen miles over paved, dirt and gravel roads with several stops along the way. We travel at your pace, however this trip is for the semi fit intermediate bike rider. Trips depart daily at 8am and 4pm. Each participant must be a minimum of 16 years old. E-bike riders must be a minimum of 18 with a valid drivers license. Online bookings must be made 10 hours in advance. Please call for shorter notice bookings.
content:
will share light history and island folklore while leading a group of up to six people around beautiful Block Island. title: Bodega

We carry everything from groceries, local eggs, pizza slices, empanadas, ice cream, bottled beverages + charcuterie board essentials to convenience items like toiletries, and sunscreen. Located on the second floor above Poor People's Pub.

author: Austin Crawford
title: Great Salt Pond Oyster co
summary: We raise the eastern oyster (Crassostrea virginica) on three acres. The oysters drink in the tides of the pond, beginning as seed in Harbor Pond, reaching maturing in Trims, and finishing in the cooler, deep water off Cormorant Cove. Grow-out method is primarily top culture (suspended floating bags on line), with a portion reaching final grow out in baskets on the pond bottom. They are all tumbled and sorted by hand Great Salt Pond oysters are harvested to order. We are a certified interstate shellfish shipper, making same day deliveries to restaurants and retail shops (contact us to set up an account). Find us at the Block Island Farmers Market on Saturdays (May to October).
content:
We raise the eastern oyster (Crassostrea virginica) on three acres. The oysters drink in the tides of the pond, beginning as seed in Harbor Pond, reaching maturing in Trims, and finishing in the cooler, deep water off Cormorant Cove. Grow-out method is primarily top culture (suspended floating bags on line), with a portion reaching final grow out in baskets on the pond bottom. They are all tumbled and sorted by hand Great Salt Pond oysters are harvested to order. We are a certified interstate shellfish shipper, making same day deliveries to restaurants and retail shops (contact us to set up an account). Find us at the Block Island Farmers Market on Saturdays (May to October).


The staff of GSP Oyster Co. (oyster farm located in the Great Salt Pond of Block Island) are also skilled shuckers. We offer shucking for hire to caterers and for private events.  A Rhode Island licensed Shellfish Dealer, we are a source for oysters.


 

Online Ordering

content:

content:
A 1790 historic building with handmade functional pottery by Joan & Arthur Mallick with additional local potter Cathy Cosby in rich blue glazes. Also Clothing graphically designed by Stephanie Mallick with Block Island landmarks & sea creatures. Photographs & photo cards by Bob Lodge and books by Joe Houlihan, ferry seahand for 40 years. All items quality made and reasonable. Family owned for 40 years.

author: Austin Crawford
title: Block Island Community Sailing
summary: Block Island Community Sailing is Block Island’s Center for adult / family sailing.  If you want to learn to sail or just experience a relaxing sail on a larger cruising sailboat, BICS offers everything from US Sailing certified keelboat sailing instruction, to a relaxing sailing cruise, for you and your family, out on Block Island Sound.  BICS sails out of the New Harbor Boat Basin (near the Oar Restaurant) with larger keelboats.  To learn more about our programs or to book a scenic 2.5-hour sailing cruise out in Block Island Sound, see our website at www.sailbi.org, or call our office at 401-741-5136

author: Austin Crawford
title: Aleksandar Baba-Vulic photography
summary: Aleksandar Baba-Vulic Photography provides a full spectrum of photography services on Block Island.
content:
Aleksandar Baba-Vulic Photography provides a full spectrum of photography services on Block Island.

A professional photographer for over 20 years, Alex is acclaimed for his stunning nature photography. His art can be purchased regularly at both the Block Island Farmer’s Market and Block Island Arts and Craft Guild.

Additionally, there are several hundred samples of Alex’s artwork displayed throughout the island’s hotels, inns, businesses and galleries.

If interested in acquiring artwork for your home or office decor your choices are unlimited. Alex’s work is offered in a wide variety of sizes in metal, canvas, acrylic or as matted prints.

Alex is also much sought after for his unique Family and Event photography. With 100’s of weddings, engagements and family photo shoots to his credit, Alex is sure to capture your special memories in a timeless and remarkable way.

Alex's address is PO Box 476, Block Island, RI

author: Austin Crawford
title: Fly The Whale
summary: Founded in 2009, Fly The Whale is a US Certified Scheduled Air Carrier offering up to 12 daily round flights between Westerly and Block Island.  Flights can be booked and changed online at www.flythewhale.com or by calling 1-800-908-0469 option 2.  Fly The Whale only operates modern turbine powered aircraft with air conditioning and a quiet and comfortable cabin for your 8 minute ride.  Corporate and frequent traveler discounts are available via our WhalePak program by calling 1-203-479-9708 or Email: commuter@flythwhale.com.  Safety, reliability, and great customer service are our hallmark.
content:
Founded in 2009, Fly The Whale is a US Certified Scheduled Air Carrier offering up to 12 daily round flights between Westerly and Block Island.  Flights can be booked and changed online at www.flythewhale.com or by calling 1-800-908-0469 option 2.  Fly The Whale only operates modern turbine powered aircraft with air conditioning and a quiet and comfortable cabin for your 8 minute ride.  Corporate and frequent traveler discounts are available via our WhalePak program by calling 1-203-479-9708 or Email: commuter@flythwhale.com.  Safety, reliability, and great customer service are our hallmark.

 
Fly The Whale operates charters in the Northeast, Florida/Bahamas, and Caribbean.  For charters availability and pricing, please contact us 1-800-908-0469 option 3 or info@flythewhale.com.

author: Austin Crawford
title: Rinaldi Roofing
summary: At Rinaldi Roofing, we believe in more than just renovations—we believe in investing in the communities we serve. Through our partnerships with homeowners on Block Island, we are committed to maintaining the character and beauty that make the island so special. We understand the delicate balance of preserving historic homes while enhancing their durability, and we work closely with homeowners to ensure every project reflects the timeless charm of Block Island. Whether it’s a historic cedar shake restoration or a modern roofing upgrade designed to withstand the coastal elements, our goal is to honor the island’s heritage while protecting its future.
content:
At Rinaldi Roofing, we believe in more than just renovations—we believe in investing in the communities we serve. Through our partnerships with homeowners on Block Island, we are committed to maintaining the character and beauty that make the island so special. We understand the delicate balance of preserving historic homes while enhancing their durability, and we work closely with homeowners to ensure every project reflects the timeless charm of Block Island. Whether it’s a historic cedar shake restoration or a modern roofing upgrade designed to withstand the coastal elements, our goal is to honor the island’s heritage while protecting its future.

We are Rhode Island’s #1 Cedar Roofing & Siding Specialist, offering expert craftsmanship in cedar shakes and shingles, as well as premium fiber cement, composite, and vinyl siding solutions. Our roofing expertise extends beyond asphalt to slate, low slope, and high-end designer options, and as a GAF Master Elite® Contractor, we provide industry-leading warranties and installations that meet the highest standards.

Whether restoring a historic home, upgrading a commercial property, or crafting a custom exterior renovation, Rinaldi Roofing delivers quality, durability, and timeless curb appeal—all backed by the integrity of a family business that puts clients first.

author: Austin Crawford
title: Spar Point Farm
summary: Spar Point Farm is presently the only agro-tourism venue on Block Island, offering a peaceful farm-stay in historic cottages brimming with island charm and overlooking the ocean. There are three cottages on the farm that each accommodate groups of 6-10 people for 7-night minimum stays during the summer high season. There is also a “studio” cottage that accommodates 1-2 people for 3-night minimum stays. During the spring and fall, all of the cottages are available for 3-night minimum stays.
content:
Spar Point Farm is presently the only agro-tourism venue on Block Island, offering a peaceful farm-stay in historic cottages brimming with island charm and overlooking the ocean. There are three cottages on the farm that each accommodate groups of 6-10 people for 7-night minimum stays during the summer high season. There is also a “studio” cottage that accommodates 1-2 people for 3-night minimum stays. During the spring and fall, all of the cottages are available for 3-night minimum stays.
 

The farm includes the island’s only working vineyard, a fruit tree orchard, honeybee apiary, produce and flower gardens, greenhouse, chicken run, and an outdoor wood-fired clay bread oven. It offers a winning combination of being well off the main road for privacy and quiet, but less than 10 minutes by car from the main port town and 5 minutes from the airport. The farm is flanked by 230 acres of conservation land to the west and enjoys sweeping views of the Atlantic Ocean, striking sunsets, and wondrous stargazing. Guests can enjoy the serenity of the setting in and around their private accommodations, and if interested they may also partake in the farm’s periodic tours and indulge in the farm’s various offerings such as honey, freshly baked breads, farm-fresh eggs, and a wide array of seasonal produce.


Cottage weblinks:
Ocean-View Cottage - airbnb.com/h/spar-point-farm-ocean-view-cottage
Ocean- View Saltbox - airbnb.com/h/spar-point-farm-ocean-view-saltbox
Vineyard Cottage - airbnb.com/h/spar-point-farm-vineyard-cottage
Vineyard Studio - airbnb.com/h/spar-point-farm-vineyard-studio

Farm website: https://sparpointfarm.com

author: Austin Crawford
title: Pondside
summary: This Property Has Everything for Block Island Vacationers! Built in 2010 on 3 acres, this property is perfect for extended and/or multiple families. The main building is three levels with a wraparound porch complete with rockers and a back patio dining area with scenic views of the pond. The top floor boasts ocean views for both the master bedroom/bath and guest bedroom/bath. The master bedroom opens to a deck which is perfect for morning coffee, reading and star-gazing. The main floor has an open kitchen/dining area with 1/2 bath, large pantry and TV room. The lower floor contains two guests bedrooms and a full bath. The dining room offers a large farm-style table that comfortably seats 12. The outside deck also offers seating for 6 guests. The separate barn has a large recreation room with entertainment center, foozball and ping pong tables and a patio with comfortable reading chairs. This building also features it’s own laundry unit and a half bath. The top floor offers a…
content:
This Property Has Everything for Block Island Vacationers! Built in 2010 on 3 acres, this property is perfect for extended and/or multiple families. The main building is three levels with a wraparound porch complete with rockers and a back patio dining area with scenic views of the pond. The top floor boasts ocean views for both the master bedroom/bath and guest bedroom/bath. The master bedroom opens to a deck which is perfect for morning coffee, reading and star-gazing. The main floor has an open kitchen/dining area with 1/2 bath, large pantry and TV room. The lower floor contains two guests bedrooms and a full bath. The dining room offers a large farm-style table that comfortably seats 12. The outside deck also offers seating for 6 guests. The separate barn has a large recreation room with entertainment center, foozball and ping pong tables and a patio with comfortable reading chairs. This building also features it’s own laundry unit and a half bath. The top floor offers a 2-bedroom apartment with full bath and kitchenette. Both buildings feature outdoor showers for easy rinsing after the beach.

content:
Based in Newport, Rhode Island.

Jessica specializes in photographing people and events. Based in Newport and a resident of Aquidneck Island, she is a lifelong New Englander with a fine-art degree in photography and has photographed professionally on digital, 35mm, and medium-format film for 20 years.

Jessica focuses on moments of connection as seen in her full portfolio of weddings, family portraits, extended family sessions, and events.  Giving clients direction with posing while also encouraging laughter and candid expressions creates the signature look her clients come back for year after year. Classic editing creates a final product that will become an instant family heirloom.

A short commute to Block Island from Newport, Jessica is available on the island year-round.

Jessica also works with small businesses here in Rhode Island creating headshots and full branding collections.  The same principles of lighting, posing, and emotion apply to create images that connect you with your ideal clients.





Member Block Island Chamber

author: Austin Crawford
title: Mobility Equipment Recyclers
summary: Mobility Equipment Recyclers started in 2013 as a social and sustainability venture aimed to benefit both people and the environment. We save mobility & medical equipment from landfills, refurbish them, and provide them at a considerable discount to individuals that need them.
content:
Mobility Equipment Recyclers started in 2013 as a social and sustainability venture aimed to benefit both people and the environment. We save mobility & medical equipment from landfills, refurbish them, and provide them at a considerable discount to individuals that need them.

author: Austin Crawford
title: Books by Cat
summary: Diego, Whynd, and the Block Island Ghost is inspired by Cat Urbain’s experiences working in haunted hotels on Block Island and living in Nicaragua. This engaging tale of a boy’s unexpected summer adventure blends humor and suspense while exploring the extraordinary power of friendship. Available locally at Island Bound Bookstore, the Glass Onion, Marye-Kelley, and the Lazy Fish. Also available on Amazon Diego, Whynd, and the Block Island Ghost: Urbain, Cat: 9798822937543: Amazon.com: Books and Barnes & Noble Diego, Whynd, and the Block Island Ghost by Cat Urbain, Paperback | Barnes & Noble®.
content:
